content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Cover page: A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, wearing a light pink summer dress with a pink bow on her ear) standing in a magical Suzhou garden at dusk, surrounded by dozens of glowing warm yellow-green fireflies. She reaches one paw up toward a firefly with wonder on her face. A gray-brown raccoon in a blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt (NOMI) sits on a garden stone nearby, smiling gently. Twilight sky in purple and orange gradients, traditional Suzhou white-walled garden in background. Dreamy, magical atmosphere.

content.text: 夏天的傍晚，太阳慢慢落下去了。苏州小花园里的风，吹得暖暖的。
content.text_en: On a summer evening, the sun slowly set. The breeze in the little Suzhou garden was warm and gentle.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A beautiful Suzhou classical garden at golden hour, with white walls, moon gate, and green bamboo. The sky is painted in warm orange and pink sunset colors. Gentle summer breeze rustles the leaves of willow trees and lotus flowers in a small pond. No characters, just the serene garden setting. Warm, peaceful, inviting atmosphere.

content.text: 咘咘和爸爸妈妈还有NOMI、NONO一起在花园里散步。咘咘穿着凉快的粉色小裙子，开心地跑来跑去。
content.text_en: Bubu was strolling in the garden with Dad, Mom, NOMI, and NONO. Bubu wore a cool pink summer dress and ran around happily.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) running happily on a stone path in a Suzhou garden. Behind her: a large golden retriever dad (Sam, golden fur, wearing a casual linen shirt and shorts, warm smile), a black-and-white cow mom (Tina, classic black-and-white pattern, wearing an elegant summer blouse and flowing skirt), a gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, black eye mask markings, ringed tail, blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt), and a small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) perched on NOMI's shoulder. Summer evening, warm golden light, garden greenery.

content.text: 突然，咘咘看到草丛里有一个小小的绿色光点在闪。"那是什么呀？"咘咘好奇地问。
content.text_en: Suddenly, Bubu spotted a tiny green glow flickering in the grass. "What's that?" Bubu asked curiously.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) crouching down near a bush in the garden, peering at a single warm yellow-green glowing firefly hovering just above the grass. Her eyes are wide with wonder and curiosity, ears perked forward. The background is a dusky Suzhou garden with soft purple twilight. The firefly's glow casts a gentle light on Bubu's face.

content.text: "那是萤火虫呀！"NOMI走过来说，"它们是大自然的小灯笼，肚子会发光呢。"
content.text_en: "That's a firefly!" NOMI came over and said, "They're nature's little lanterns — their bellies can glow!"
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, standard raccoon coloring with black eye mask markings, ringed tail, wearing a blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt) kneeling beside a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear). NOMI points gently toward a glowing firefly with one clever paw. Both look at the firefly with soft smiles. Dusky Suzhou garden background, a few more fireflies beginning to appear in the distance. Warm magical lighting.

content.text: 咘咘的眼睛亮了起来："好漂亮！我要抓一只带回家！"她伸出小手去够那只萤火虫。
content.text_en: Bubu's eyes lit up: "So pretty! I want to catch one and take it home!" She reached out her little paw toward the firefly.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes sparkling with excitement, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) stretching both paws up eagerly trying to catch a warm yellow-green glowing firefly that hovers just out of reach above her. Her expression is determined and excited. The firefly glows brightly against the dusky purple-blue sky. Several more fireflies visible in the garden background. Dynamic, playful pose.

content.text: 可是，每次咘咘的手快碰到萤火虫，它就"嗖"地飞走了。咘咘追着萤火虫跑来跑去。
content.text_en: But every time Bubu's paw almost touched the firefly, it zipped away. Bubu chased the fireflies back and forth.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) running and leaping through a Suzhou garden at twilight, chasing several warm yellow-green glowing fireflies that dance and scatter away from her. Motion blur on her running feet, arms outstretched. Fireflies leave little trails of light. The garden path winds between rocks and bamboo. Playful, energetic scene with magical lighting.

content.text: 追了好久好久，咘咘累得气喘吁吁，一只萤火虫也没抓到。她一屁股坐在石头上，小嘴撅了起来。
content.text_en: After chasing for a long, long time, Bubu was panting and exhausted, without catching a single one. She plopped down on a rock and pouted.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes looking disappointed, pink inner ears slightly drooping, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) sitting on a large garden stone, cheeks puffed out in a pout, paws resting on her knees. She looks tired and frustrated. A few fireflies glow in the distance, far away from her. Dusky Suzhou garden setting, soft blue-purple evening light. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) perched on the stone next to her, tilting its head sympathetically.

content.text: NOMI轻轻坐到咘咘旁边，说："咘咘，你知道吗？有些美好的东西，不需要抓住它。看着，就很美了。"
content.text_en: NOMI gently sat down beside Bubu and said, "Bubu, did you know? Some beautiful things don't need to be caught. Just watching them is beautiful enough."
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, standard raccoon coloring with black eye mask markings, ringed tail, wearing a blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt) sitting on a garden stone next to a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes looking up at NOMI, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear). NOMI has one arm gently around Bubu's shoulder, speaking softly with a wise, tender expression. Fireflies glow softly in the background. Intimate, warm moment. Dusky garden, soft warm lighting.

content.text: "可是...我好想把它带回家呀。"咘咘小声说。
content.text_en: "But... I really want to take one home," Bubu whispered.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. Close-up of a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes glistening with a hint of wistfulness, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) looking down at her empty cupped paws. Her expression is gentle sadness mixed with longing. A single firefly glows softly in the blurred background. Soft bokeh effect with warm yellow-green firefly lights. Intimate, emotional close-up shot.

content.text: NOMI笑了笑："你试试安安静静地坐着，不去追它们。也许，它们会自己来找你呢。"
content.text_en: NOMI smiled: "Try sitting very still and quiet, without chasing them. Maybe they'll come find you."
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, standard raccoon coloring with black eye mask markings, ringed tail, wearing a blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt) smiling warmly and holding up one finger as if sharing a secret, sitting next to a snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes looking curious and hopeful, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear). Both sitting on a stone in the garden. A few distant fireflies glow. Gentle, encouraging mood.

content.text: 咘咘半信半疑地闭上了嘴巴，安安静静地坐着。爸爸妈妈也静静地坐在不远处，微笑地看着她。
content.text_en: Half-believing, Bubu closed her mouth and sat very still. Mom and Dad sat quietly nearby, watching her with gentle smiles.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) sitting very still on a garden stone with hands folded in her lap, eyes wide and watchful. In the background, a large golden retriever dad (Sam, golden fur, casual linen shirt) and a black-and-white cow mom (Tina, elegant summer blouse) sit together on a garden bench, smiling tenderly at Bubu. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt) sits beside Bubu. Evening garden, soft twilight, fireflies beginning to drift closer.

content.text: 慢慢地，一只萤火虫飞了过来，停在了咘咘的鼻子上。接着又来了一只，两只，三只......整个花园都亮了起来！咘咘开心地笑了，轻轻地说："原来不用抓，看着就好美。"
content.text_en: Slowly, one firefly drifted over and landed on Bubu's nose. Then came another, and another... The whole garden lit up! Bubu smiled happily and whispered, "So I don't need to catch them. Just watching is so beautiful."
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. MAGICAL CLIMAX SCENE: A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes full of wonder and joy, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) sitting still on a garden stone, beaming with the most beautiful smile. One glowing warm yellow-green firefly sits right on her pink nose. Many more fireflies surround her — on her ears, her shoulders, her paws, floating all around her. The entire Suzhou garden is illuminated by hundreds of warm yellow-green firefly lights, creating a magical dreamy glow. A gray-brown raccoon (NOMI, blue-and-white striped summer t-shirt) watches with a proud, tender smile. A small bright red bird (NONO, orange-yellow beak) perches on a branch above, bathed in firefly light. Breathtaking, magical, emotional peak of the story.

content.text: 那天晚上，咘咘做了一个梦。梦里，她变成了一只小萤火虫，在花园里自由自在地飞呀飞，把整个世界都照亮了。
content.text_en: That night, Bubu had a dream. In her dream, she became a little firefly, flying freely through the garden, lighting up the whole world.
content.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, warm soft lighting, children's picture book illustration, vertical portrait composition. DREAM SEQUENCE: A snow-white rabbit girl (Bubu, pure white fur, big round brown eyes, pink inner ears, light pink summer dress, pink bow on ear) floating and flying through a fantastical starry night garden, with tiny translucent golden wings like a firefly on her back, her belly glowing warm yellow-green. She spreads her arms wide with pure joy. Below her, the Suzhou garden is a magical landscape of glowing flowers, luminous paths, and fireflies everywhere. Dreamy, ethereal quality with soft-focus edges and sparkles. A crescent moon smiles in the sky. The most magical, dreamlike ending scene.
